title: Remove Papr - it's no longer functional on this repo
body: Necessary to land further commits in this branch

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/v1.0/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
We need to land this prior to #2890
Is the integration failure a known issue or a flake?
Rerunning. This branch is months old, so I'm no longer sure what flakes to expect on it.
